intro: This Product User Manual (PUM) guides users on the High-Resolution Layer Small Landscape Features (SLF) for the 2021 reference year. It details product definitions and specifications, covering raster and vector layers dedicated to mapping woody vegetation. The SLF, covering 38 EEA member countries and the UK, leverages Very High Resolution imagery and Sentinel-2 data. The manual aids in understanding product quality, terms of use, and technical support, whilst outlining a comprehensive approach to land cover characterisation.
